notable_facts: California issued its first personalized vanity plate in late 1970.
As of 2007, over 1.4 million vanity plates were on California roads, generating over $1 billion for environmental programs.
California offers multiple standard plate designs including the legacy black-and-gold style.
Steve Jobs leased a new silver Mercedes SL55 AMG every six months to exploit a California loophole allowing new cars six months before plates were required. He never had plates.
